data.content:
Implementation review:

Diff inspection (29c4d824):
- agent-history-session-card.tsx: clean replacement of buildAgentLabel call with formatAgentDisplayLabel from @/lib/agent-identity. The empty-input guard preserves the prior callsite UX (label rendered conditionally as `agentLabel ? ... : null`).
- agent-history-utils.tsx: clean deletion of buildAgentLabel and the now-unused formatModelDisplay import. No other code in this file referenced buildAgentLabel.

Acceptance criteria:
1. agent-history-utils.tsx no longer contains a parallel formatter — VERIFIED.
2. Caller uses formatAgentDisplayLabel from @/lib/agent-identity — VERIFIED.
3. grep shows zero hits for buildAgentLabel — VERIFIED.
4. Tests pass — VERIFIED (310 files / 3095 tests green).

Quality gates: lint, tsc --noEmit, test, build — all green.

Out-of-scope guardrails honored: no edits to src/lib/agent-identity.ts (988b territory) or src/components/beat-table-metadata.tsx (c257 territory).

Approved for shipment.
